title: Authored Financial Tower
description: An authored financial tower with exact dimensional settings and seeded setback tiers, semantic podium/shaft/crown/roof planning, reserved central glass and corner zones, a projected colonnade and trim hierarchy, material-slot instancing, and three light-space cached shadow levels with texel snapping, cross-fades, age, and update budgeting.
backend: WebGL2 / semantic instancing and cached shadow maps
techniques: semantic facade modules and reserved zones
cached shadow update budget and cross-fade
